case_title: CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. DESAI ENTERPRISES LLC

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PAUL SARMIENTO. DEFENDANT DESAI ENTERPRISES LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,289.95 FILED BY CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT DESAI ENTERPRISES LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2024 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PAUL SARMIENTO FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2024 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO AUG-19-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PAUL SARMIENTO. DEFENDANT DESAI ENTERPRISES LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAIVD FLESIG; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESAI ENTERPRISES LLC $2,289.95 PRINCIPAL, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,529.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $240 SERVED MAY-27-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DESAI ENTERPRISES LLC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DESAI ENTERPRISES LLC
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE AUG-05-2024 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
